leagueBriefing: The 2026 NCAA Tournament kicked off with a pair of First Four thrillers in Dayton, where Texas survived a last-second scare and Howard made program history with its first-ever tournament victory.

games.headline: Tramon Mark leaves it late to send Texas past NC State in First Four
games.brief: In a physical battle between two 11-seeds, Tramon Mark proved why he's the go-to option for the Longhorns. With the game tied and the clock winding down, Mark drove the length of the floor to bank in a leaning jumper with just 1.1 seconds remaining. NC State, which fought back from a late deficit, couldn't get a final shot off, ending a gritty season for the Wolfpack while Texas moves on to face 6-seed Iowa State.
bullets: Tramon Mark led all scorers with 17 points, including the game-winning bucket in the final seconds.
Quadir Copeland paced NC State with 16 points, 8 rebounds, and 4 steals in a losing effort.
Texas held a narrow 30-29 lead at halftime and managed to withstand a late 7-0 Wolfpack run.
The Longhorns shot 44% from the field compared to 41% for NC State.
Texas advances to the Round of 64 to face Iowa State in the West Region.
games.context: Texas advances to face 6-seed Iowa State in the West Region bracket.

games.headline: Howard survives UMBC's late surge to claim first NCAA Tournament win
games.brief: Howard finally has its 'One Shining Moment.' The Bison jumped out to a dominant start and held off a furious second-half rally from UMBC to secure the first NCAA Tournament win in school history. Bryce Harris was a force inside, racking up a massive double-double to ensure Howard wouldn't be on the wrong end of another UMBC miracle. The Bison now head to the Midwest Region's main bracket for a date with top-seeded Auburn.
bullets: Bryce Harris dominated the paint for Howard, finishing with 19 points and 14 rebounds.
UMBC's Dion Brown missed a potential game-tying three-pointer as the buzzer sounded.
The Bison led by as many as 12 points in the first half before UMBC's 42-point second-half surge.
De'Shane Armstrong Jr. led the Retrievers with 17 points and 6 rebounds.
This victory marks the first-ever NCAA Tournament win for the Howard Bison program.
games.context: Howard makes history with its first tournament win and advances to face 1-seed Auburn.
